title: 2009 Castleford Tigers season
wikitext:
{{Use British English|date=May 2014}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=April 2026}}
The [[Castleford Tigers]] competed in their [[Super League XIV|twelfth]] [[Super League]] in their 84th [[rugby league]] season. They also competed in the [[2009 Challenge Cup]].
